author: erallie
description: Displays discord timestamps in read mode as they would appear in Discord.

manifest.author: Erika Gozar
manifest.description: Displays discord timestamps in read mode as they would appear in Discord.
manifest.name: Discord Timestamps

name: Discord Timestamps

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added tooltips that display the raw text of the timestamp when you hover over the buttons in the "insert timestamp" modal.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.18...1.0.19

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Changed "timezone" to "time zone" throughout the plugin.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.17...1.0.18

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added settings to manually specify your local timezone instead of having the plugin auto-detect it.
- Added a setting to clear the timestamp history.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.16...1.0.17

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Updated the styles with the new features for mobile.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.15...1.0.16

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added a way to choose the **timezone** when inserting a timestamp.
- Added a way to **choose from a history** of previously used timestamps when inserting a timestamp.
  - Added a setting to determine how many timestamps are stored in the history.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.14...1.0.15

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Small update to make inserting a timestamp replace any text you have selected before running the command.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.13...1.0.14

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed an issue where **Override markdown codeblocks** wouldn't function if **Convert code blocks** was enabled.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.12...1.0.13

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed an issue where some timestamps in markdown code blocks weren't overridden.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.11...1.0.12

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added a setting to override the format of timestamps in markdown codeblocks.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.10...1.0.11

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Officially fixed the `styles.css` for the insert timestamp modal for mobile.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.9...1.0.10

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Attempting to fix `styles.css` for mobile again.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.8...1.0.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Reformatted the modal to insert timestamps for mobile.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.7...1.0.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added a setting to disable converting timestamps in codeblocks.
- Added a command to insert a timestamp from the Command palette or the editor context menu.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed the last update to use `ontouchend` instead of `onClickEvent`, since it only applies to mobile, and mobile doesn't use `onClickEvent`.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added functionality on mobile to display the full timestamp in a notice when clicking on the timestamp.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.4...1.0.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed an issue where the text following the last timestamp would be cut off.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.3...1.0.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added a background color to the timestamps.
- Made the timestamp display the full timestamp on hover, just like on Discord

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Removed `styles.css` from the release since it is not used.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Erallie/discord-timestamps/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This is the first release so that I can start testing out this plugin in my other vaults.
releases.name: Initial Release
